CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, TRUE);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, FALSE);
SELECT NOT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT NOT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, NOT value FROM test_table WHERE value = TRUE;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE NOT (value = TRUE);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE NOT (EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = TRUE));
SELECT id FROM test_table t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_table t2 WHERE t1.id = t2.id AND t2.value = FALSE);
SELECT id, NOT (value AND TRUE) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, NOT (value OR FALSE) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, value, NOT (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, NOT (CASE WHEN value THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = FALSE);
SELECT t1.id, NOT (t1.value OR t2.value) FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE NOT (id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = TRUE));
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT a.id, NOT (t.value) FROM another_table a JOIN test_table t ON a.ref_id = t.id;
